channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Central Myanmar shaken by new quake in one of the biggest aftershocks since March 28 temblor
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A magnitude 5.5 earthquake struck on Sunday morning near Meiktila, a small city in central Myanmar, according to the U.S. Geological Survey.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Popular soup, bowl products may be contaminated; USDA issues public health alert
item.description: The USDA has issued a nationwide public health alert warning consumers that some popular soup and bowl products could be contaminated with wood.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Kansas man who was falsely accused of being a shooter after Chiefs’ 2024 Super Bowl win has died
item.description: A Kansas man who was falsely accused of being among the shooters who opened fire at a rally celebrating the Kansas City Chiefs’ Super Bowl victory last year has died.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 5 major unreleased movies we'll (probably) never get to see
item.description: "Coyote vs. Acme" was recently rescued from obscurity after being shelved by Warner Bros. Discovery. But other films haven't been so lucky.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: These bars and restaurants are being called the most 'outstanding' in the country
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Foodies and restaurant lovers across the U.S. will need to add some new spots to their lists of places to eat with the James Beard Foundation officially announcing its finalists for this year’s most “outstanding” restaurant and bar in the country.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Democrats dislike the 'chaos' of Trump's trade war but are OK with some tariffs
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Democrats are quick to say that President Donald Trump’s tariffs are horrible, awful, terrible. But Democrats are also stressing that they are not inherently anti-tariff. What Trump's political opponents say they really dislike is the “chaos” he has unleashed.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and MATT BROWN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Amanda Knox says Catholic priest ‘saw my humanity’ in prison, helped restore faith in herself
item.description: When Amanda Knox was behind bars in Italy, she befriended an Italian priest, Don Saulo. Knox, now a mother of two, has written a new book, "Free: My Search for Meaning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Deadly crash raises new questions about safety of New York’s helicopter tours
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A helicopter ride giving a thrilling sweep of Manhattan’s iconic skyline has long been on the to-do list for New York City tourists of means.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RFK Jr. wants to target chronic disease in US tribes. A key program to do that was gutted
item.description: CHANDLER, Ariz. (AP) — Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. spent time in tribal communities in Arizona and New Mexico this week highlighting ways they are trying to prevent chronic disease among Native Americans and Alaska Natives, something he has said is one of his top priorities.
item.dc:creator: DEVNA BOSE, GRAHAM LEE BREWER and BECKY BOHRER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Titanic engineers kept power on until the end to aid evacuation
item.description: "Titanic: The Digital Resurrection" follows scientists analyzing the first-ever complete 3D replica of the ship.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Divers search for parts after NYC helicopter crash killed a family of five and the pilot, a Navy vet
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Divers using sonar searched Friday for key pieces of a sightseeing helicopter that broke apart in midair and plunged into the Hudson River between Manhattan and New Jersey. All six people aboard were killed — a family of five from Spain and the pilot, a 36-year-old U.S. Navy veteran.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, DAVE COLLINS and TED SHAFFREY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump undergoes his annual physical after years of reluctance to share medical information
item.description: Donald Trump had his annual physical on Friday, a check-up that may give the public its first details in years about the health of a man who, in January, became the oldest in U.S. history to be sworn in as president.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina executes second man by firing squad in 5 weeks
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — A firing squad on Friday executed a South Carolina man who killed an off-duty police officer, the second time the rare execution method has been used by the state in the past five weeks.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Jewish families channel Passover story after devastating losses in Los Angeles wildfires
item.description: PASADENA, California (AP) — Aty Rotter lost her family home and her spiritual home in the ravenous fire that scorched a large swath of Los Angeles County earlier this year.
item.dc:creator: DEEPA BHARATH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Feds say agents went to LA schools to do welfare check on migrant children
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Homeland Security officers visited two Los Angeles public elementary schools this week to do a welfare check on migrant children, not for immigration enforcement, the department said Friday. The officers were denied access by both principals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Florida universities to deputize campus police for immigration enforcement
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — The police departments of at least three public universities in Florida are seeking agreements with the federal government to carry out immigration enforcement on campus.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Justice Department tasked with enforcing Trump's transgender sports ban in Maine
item.description: PORTLAND, Maine (AP) — Maine officials said Friday the state will not comply with a ban on transgender athletes in high school sports in the wake of a Trump administration finding that the state violated antidiscrimination laws by allowing the students to participate. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Universal announces UK theme park amid 'epic' growth of parks business
item.description: Universal Destinations & Experiences is expanding its global theme park footprint, confirming a new theme park will be built in the U.K. -- the latest in a trio of ambitious projects for the company.
item.dc:creator: Scott Gustin, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Woman unknowingly gives birth to a stranger's baby after IVF clinic error
item.description: A woman in Australia unknowingly gave birth to a stranger’s baby after she received another patient's embryo from her in vitro fertilization clinic.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Social Security Administration 'will be using X to communicate' moving forward
item.description: The shift comes as communications staff at the agency has dwindled due to reassignments in front-facing roles at field offices across the country.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Amazon CEO: Sellers will try to pass tariff costs along to buyers
item.description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy predicted that the retailer’s web of third-party sellers will try to pass the extra costs incurred by the Trump administration's wide-ranging tariffs on to buyers.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: What we know about the New York City helicopter crash that killed 6 people
item.description: Six people were killed when a sightseeing helicopter broke apart and crashed into the Hudson River between New York City and New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NYC university sued, accused of not taking action against antisemitic harassment
item.description: Brandon White is suing the New School after the university allegedly failed to take action on harassment. White, who is not Jewish, claims to have been targeted by pro-Palestinian agitators.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Could Trump's tariffs slow emissions? Sure, experts say, but at great cost overall
item.description: President Donald Trump’s sweeping global tariffs have stirred widespread anxiety about a severe economic downturn -- and curiosity, for some, about how it might affect the world’s warming climate.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart employee accused of killing co-worker inside store
item.description: A Walmart employee shot and killed a co-worker inside a Georgia store and critically wounded another worker outside early Friday while the business was closed to the public, authorities said. Newton County deputies responded to the shooting at the Walmart in Covington, Georgia, at around 1:30 a.m.
item.dc:creator: D.V. Wise, KTLA 5

item.title: Judge scolds DOJ for demanding delay in mistakenly deported man case
item.description: The federal judge who ordered the Trump administration to try to return Kilmar Abrego Garcia, the man mistakenly deported to El Salvador, scolded the Justice Department for demanding more time to update the court on next steps.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WGN 9

item.title: Family from Spain, pilot killed in NYC sightseeing helicopter crash
item.description: Photos posted on the helicopter company’s website showed the couple and their children smiling as they boarded just before the flight took off.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, WFLA, NBC

item.title: China announces countermeasures by raising tariffs on US goods from 84% to 125% from Saturday
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China announced countermeasures on Friday, raising tariffs on U.S. goods from 84% to 125% starting Saturday. The U.S. and China have escalated trade war by raising tariffs even as U.S. President Donald Trump hit a pause on tariffs for other countries.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Judge will halt Trump administration from ending humanitarian parole for people from four countries
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — A federal judge said Thursday that she will prevent the Trump administration from ordering hundreds of thousands of Cubans, Haitians, Nicaraguans and Venezuelans with temporary legal status to leave the country later this month.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Olivia Munn mocks Trump's tariffs during surprise 'Daily Show' appearance
item.description: "Trump knows exactly what he's doing. He put tariffs that destroyed the global economy, so then he took them off, and now it's only mostly destroyed," Munn said.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: Movie theaters erupt in chaos as part of 'Minecraft' social media trend
item.description: Rowdy crowds of young people have been disrupting screenings of the newly released "A Minecraft Movie.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, Fox 5

item.title: Stocks slide as Trump's trade war with China spooks Wall Street
item.description: Stocks slid Thursday as President Trump’s escalating trade war with China and concerns about its economic implications continued to rattle Wall Street.
item.dc:creator: Sylvan Lane, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Drug lord linked to DEA agent’s death freed
item.description: One of the three leaders of the Guadalajara cartel linked to the torture-slaying of Drug Enforcement Administration Agent Enrique “Kiki” Camarena in 1985 has been released in Mexico, according to news reports.
item.dc:creator: Julian Resendiz, Fox 5

item.title: GiveSendGo defends fundraiser for track meet stabbing suspect
item.description: Karmelo Anthony, 17, was arrested in the fatal stabbing of another Texas high school student, Austin Metcalf.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Annual White House Christmas ornament honors state dinner culinary diplomacy
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The art of culinary diplomacy, practiced by presidents at White House state dinners for more than 150 years, is the theme of this year's official White House Christmas ornament.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's tariffs threaten to end quarter-century era of cheap goods for U.S. consumers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump’s new tariffs threaten to push up prices on clothes, mobile phones, furniture and many other products in the coming months, possibly ending the era of cheap goods that Americans enjoyed for about a quarter-century before the pandemic.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER RUGABER and ANNE D'INNOCENZIO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Egg prices jump to record high despite Trump's predictions and bird flu slowing
item.description: The increase reported Thursday in the Consumer Price Index means consumers and businesses that rely on eggs should not anticipate immediate relief.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
